macro.title: Argyle integrates with Vesta LOS to streamline mortgage verification workflows
macro.what: Argyle has integrated its direct-source income, employment and asset verification tools into Vesta’s loan origination system.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Market Jitters Drive Mortgage Rates Up, Sending Some Would-Be Homebuyers to the Sidelines
macro.what: Higher housing costs, along with economic uncertainty that comes with the Iran war, are causing some house hunters to think twice
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Austin council pushes new zoning laws for missing middle housing
housing.what: Austin city lawmakers bent on ensuring the Texas capital sustains momentum in a housing supply expansion that cuts into a home shortage and slows price growth took another step last week
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: How the ROAD to Housing Act could improve home affordability
housing.what: The ROAD act targets a 37% affordability gap with supply incentives, ADU support and small dollar mortgage fixes, with limits.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Lennar KB Home synergies could mirror the CalAtlantic playbook
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: How boomer housing dominance is forcing real estate agents to retool
housing.what: Top-producing agents told HousingWire the industry is pivoting toward multi-generational advisory work, and research has confirmed why.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Citywide Home Mortgage promotes Robert Coomer to chief growth officer
housing.what: Citywide Home Mortgage promoted Robert Coomer to chief growth officer to drive national expansion and its charter branch partnership model.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: NHCA aims to connect Hispanic construction workers and housing pros
housing.what: A new organization is working to connect the Hispanic workers building homes with the real estate professionals selling them.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Over Half of Home Listings Have Been Lingering on the Market For More Than 2 Months
housing.what: In dollar terms, there’s $347 billion worth of stale listings in the U.S., more than ever before for this time of year
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: 14% of Home-Sale Agreements Fell Through Last Month–A Record for February
housing.what: House hunters have the upper hand, allowing them to abandon deals over price, repairs or second thoughts
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: U.S. Home Prices Barely Budged in February
housing.what: Home prices rose 0.1% month over month on a seasonally adjusted basis—the slowest growth in seven months
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: Policy turmoil, fiscal uncertainty cause retirement hesitation
notables.what: Findings from a recent survey show 21% of unretired respondents postponing retirement and 33% moving to safer portfolios.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Compass International Holdings names Rory Golod president of growth
notables.what: CIH names Rory Golod president of growth, targeting Compass platform adoption for 340,000 agents in 2026 and 2027.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: ALTA renews TrustLink as elite provider for 2026
notables.what: ALTA has renewed TrustLink as an Elite Provider, extending trust accounting and reconciliation benefits and fee waivers to ALTA members.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
